steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Maize “shows so little resemblance to any wild plant that genetic research was necessary to ______.” This tells us visual inspection couldn't reveal the ancestor, so genetic research had to accomplish something definitive.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Confirm = to establish as true, and genetic research was necessary to confirm teosinte grass as its ancestor by verifying the relationship. Acquire, develop, and attract are all incompatible with this meaning. That confirms D is correct.
